title: Kickoff agent for GH #62: KnowledgeManager for shared research

comments.author: m1
comments.content: Plan: Launch autonomous agent to implement KnowledgeManager (GH #62). Core struct modeled after SyncManager with orphan branch + worktree pattern. Need to add serde_yaml dep for frontmatter parsing. Reference SyncManager in sync.rs for worktree detection and fetch/push patterns.
